arts.ttl: Promotion candidates consider offer for Burnley player – Loan with option to buy
arts.sum: According to a claim in the French media, Metz are showing interest in Burnley defender Hannes Delcroix. The 25-year-old has been snubbed by Scott Parker this season and could look to leave Turf Moor in this transfer window. Foot Mecarto have reported on Metz’s pursuit of Delcroix following reports their central defender Sadibou Sané could The post Promotion candidates consider offer for Burnley player – Loan with option to buy appeared first on Sport Witness.
